T0038.title: Premium Card For Masses
T0038.definition: A colloquial term in credit card enthusiast circles for three premium, high-annual-fee cards that can be effectively offset through reward points, making them accessible to ordinary consumers. The term is used ironically rather than pejoratively. The trio includes the Bank of Communications White Unicorn Card, known for high credit limits and perks like airport lounge access; the China Merchants Bank Classic Platinum, offering services such as golf course access and high-value insurance; and the Shanghai Pudong Development Bank American Express Platinum, which provides benefits like hotel discounts and expedited airport clearance.
T0038.description: The three cards are: the Bank of Communications White Unicorn Card, known for high credit limits and perks like airport lounge access; the China Merchants Bank Classic Platinum, offering services such as golf course access and high-value insurance; and the Shanghai Pudong Development Bank American Express Platinum, which provides benefits like hotel discounts and expedited airport clearance.
T0038.usageExample: 最近浦发AE白放水，中介说屌丝三白里这张性价比最高，能帮我包装下卡。
